{"text":"+DivineMedicus My problem with the front page and trending section nowadays is that it doesn't showcase as many small YouTubers as it used to. I've never heard of 5MadMovieMakers before seeing this video, and I discovered it on reddit."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"The trending section just seems to be the most popular videos on YouTube, which is totally fine to have a section for the most viewed/best rated videos. But stack Hot Wheels Road Trip up against a LeafyIsHere video which gets 500K+ views in 10 minutes or PewDiePie, or VanossGaming... All of their videos just seem more "cookie cutter" than the wild west days of YouTube."},{"text":"
"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"I guess I'm just trying to say I miss the days when you never knew what you were going to get coming to YouTube. And I am glad people are still making original type videos like this one.
